query:
-- phone_numbers.number = "0738813335" (no spaces)
-- services.phoneNumber = "07 3891 2724" (with spaces)
-- Need to strip spaces from services.phoneNumber to match

UPDATE services AS u
JOIN phone_numbers AS pn 
  ON pn.number = REPLACE(u.phoneNumber, ' ', '')
SET u.customerExternalId = pn.customerExternalId
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.phoneNumber IS NOT NULL AND u.phoneNumber != ''
  AND u.phoneNumber NOT LIKE '%Unknown%'
  AND pn.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND pn.customerExternalId != '';

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS rows_updated_phone_match;

UPDATE services AS u

  ON pn.number = REPLACE(u.phoneNumber, ' ', '')
